docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PARAMOUNT HOTEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARAMOUNT HOTEL $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $165.00, UNREASONABLE RESTRICTION ON VISITORS. 9:00 AM TO 5:00 PM. LACK OF ACCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CAMPBELL EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT PARAMOUNT HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
